zh.Bramford, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可布拉福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Magdalene Treathone於1577年4月28日出生在英國素福爾可布拉福德時，她的父親Thomas Treathone35歲，母親Abigail Roses Grysell31歲。她於1599年5月29日與John Collins在英國英格蘭素福爾可布拉福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1642年7月8日在她的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可布拉福德。

zh-hans.Bramford, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可布拉福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Magdalene Treathone于1577年4月28日出生在英国素福爾可布拉福德时，她的父亲Thomas Treathone35岁，母亲Abigail Roses Grysell31岁。她于1599年5月29日与John Collins在英国英格兰素福爾可布拉福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1642年7月8日在她的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可布拉福德。

meanings: New Testament: byname of Mary Magdalene. See Madeleine .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Magdalene Treathone was born on 28 April 1577, in Bramford, Suffolk, England, her father, Thomas Treathone, was 35 and her mother, Abigail Roses Grysell, was 31. She married John Collins on 29 May 1599, in Bramford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 8 July 1642, in her hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Bramford, Suffolk, England.

fr.Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Magdalene Treathone est née le 28 avril 1577, à Bramford, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Treathone, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Abigail Roses Grysell, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé John Collins le 29 mai 1599, à Bramford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 juillet 1642, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Bramford, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America
de.lifeSummary: Als Magdalene Treathone am 28. April 1577 in Bramford, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Treathone 35 und ihre Mutter Abigail Roses Grysell 31. Sie hat am 29. Mai 1599 in Bramford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom John Collins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. Juli 1642 im Alter von 65 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Bramford, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Magdalene Treathone è nata il il 28 aprile 1577 nel Bramford, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Thomas Treathone, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Abigail Roses Grysell, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato John Collins il 29 maggio 1599, nel Bramford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 luglio 1642, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Bramford, Suffolk, England.

ko.Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 캄브리지
ko.lifeSummary: Magdalene Treathone(이)가 1577년 4월 28일 영국 수폴크 브램퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Treathone(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Abigail Roses Grysell(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1599년 5월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브램퍼드에서 John Collins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1642년 7월 8일 그녀의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 브램퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Magdalene Treathone nasceu em 28 de abril de 1577, em Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Treathone, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Abigail Roses Grysell, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com John Collins em 29 de maio de 1599, em Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de julho de 1642, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: камбридж, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Magdalene Treathone родилась 28 апреля 1577 г. в местности брамфорд, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Treathone было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Abigail Roses Grysell, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Collins 29 мая 1599 г. в местности брамфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 8 июля 1642 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности брамфорд, суффолк, Англия.

Se casó con John Collins el 29 de mayo de 1599, en Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de julio de 1642, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Bramford, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
